title: Unused imports in server.py
evidence: server.py:2 imports json (unused), server.py:3 imports Any (unused), server.py:9 imports normalize_team_name and team_matches (both unused in server.py)
suggestion: Remove unused imports: json, Any, normalize_team_name, team_matches

title: Multiple lines exceed standard line length limit
evidence: server.py:73-74,118-119 have chained pandas expressions exceeding 88 chars; test_server.py:275,421 similar
suggestion: Break long lines or increase configured max-line-length

title: Ambiguous variable name 'l' in test file
evidence: test_server.py:275 and test_server.py:421 use variable 'l' (lowercase L), ambiguous with numeral 1

title: No dependency management file
evidence: No requirements.txt, pyproject.toml, or setup.py in run directory; pandas and mcp are implicit dependencies
suggestion: Add requirements.txt or pyproject.toml listing pandas and mcp

title: BR-Football-Dataset extended statistics not exposed via MCP tools
evidence: data_loader.py:106-115 loads BR-Football-Dataset.csv with columns (corners, attacks, shots) but all_matches() at data_loader.py:199-227 excludes it; no tool exposes these extended stats
suggestion: Include br_football in all_matches() or add a dedicated tool for extended match statistics
